query_normalized: latent spatial memory for video world models computer science
rationale: This paper directly addresses the user's research question on memory mechanisms for video world models, satisfying criteria (a) same-mechanism evidence and (b) independent/dependent variable on the same domain. The paper proposes a hybrid memory architecture (HyDRA) for video world models that handles spatial-temporal continuity when subjects go out of view, which is precisely the type of latent spatial memory mechanism the user is investigating.
